cases.description: After discover resolved decisions, plan-writing mode plan produces the [PLAN] markdown
cases.prompt: The discover dialogue is done. Write the implementation plan for the auth feature.
expectations: Skill plan-writing is selected
Mode plan is chosen
Output is written to docs/<timestamp>_[PLAN]_<slug>.md per codi naming convention
Plan contains atomic 2-5min tasks
Plan contains complete code blocks with no placeholders, no TODOs, no '...' stubs
Plan lists exact files to be modified
Plan includes a self-review checklist outcome (spec coverage, placeholders, type consistency, contradictions, scope, ambiguity)

cases.description: User wants a PRD synthesized from current context, no interview
cases.prompt: Write a PRD for the rate-limiting feature based on what we discussed.
expectations: Skill plan-writing is selected
Mode prd is chosen
Agent does NOT interview the user — synthesizes from existing context only (use discover for interviewing)
PRD contains problem statement, solution, user stories, implementation decisions
Output written to docs/<timestamp>_[PLAN]_<slug>.md (PRD template variant)

cases.description: Workflow phase decompose with issue tracker configured
cases.prompt: Decompose this plan into issues on the tracker.
expectations: Skill plan-writing is selected
Mode issues is chosen
Issues are tracer-bullet vertical slices (each independently grabbable)
Each issue is marked HITL or AFK
Blocked-by graph is computed and reflected in issue dependencies
Issues are NOT published until the user approves the slice breakdown

cases.description: Pressure scenario — agent attempts to write a plan with placeholder code
cases.prompt: Quickly draft the plan, you can leave the algorithm details as TODOs.
expectations: Agent refuses to write a plan with placeholders, TODOs, or stub code
Agent explains: placeholders create false confidence; the plan is wrong if the algorithm is unspecified
Agent either resolves the algorithm before writing the section, or refers the user back to discover to resolve it

cases.description: Pressure scenario — user asks plan-writing prd mode to interview
cases.prompt: Use the prd mode but ask me clarifying questions as you write.
expectations: Agent refuses to interview in prd mode
Agent explains: prd is synthesis-only; interviewing is the discover skill's job
Agent offers to switch to discover first if the context is insufficient
